channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: A Texas prosecutor reveals new details in an ICE killing of a Houston father
item.description: A federal prosecutor in Texas has shared new details about the shooting of Mexican national Lorenzo Salgado Araujo by an ICE officer in early July.

item.title: Wildfire smoke from Canada and Minnesota pushes farther into the US and engulfs DC in haze
Social media influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate arrested in Miami, US Marshals Service tells AP
